productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Black Handbags
description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this handbag from United Colours Of Benetton will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits. It has a great silhouette and lots of space to accomodate all your essentials! MeasurementHeight: 46 cmWidth: 9 cmDepth: 41 cmMade of 75% polyester and 25% polyurethane for durability and comfort One main roomy zippered compartment, with one mobile pouch and one inner zippered pouchLeather strap with buckles at the side, and has a longer PU strapLeather panels at the side and baseMagnectic button closureBranded zippers for durabilityBrand name appliqued on the inside for styleCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust
